summary: Implemented two-layer stuck-download prevention: (1) Watchdog timer in DownloadProgressService fires every 60s, detects downloads with no progress for 5+ minutes, cancels via CancellationRegistry and marks as Timeout. (2) Force-interrupt mechanism in all file handlers (Files, Videos, Music, Photos) uses token.Register(stream.Dispose) so hung DownloadFileAsync calls are broken even when WTelegram never calls the progress callback. BaseMessage.MakeProgress now returns (callback, token) tuple. WithRetryAsync updated to not retry on cancellation. All builds pass 0 errors. Committed and pushed as ade7816.
current_status: v2.2.10 on GitHub with stuck-download watchdog. Downloads will auto-recover within 5 minutes if stuck.
